color-no-hex.message: Colors must come from design tokens (src/styles/tokens.css) — RFC-400 §3

selector-class-pattern.message: Class names must be semantic BEM (block__element--modifier) — RFC-400 §2

property-disallowed-list.message: Forbidden material (ADR-003 §4): no shadows or glassmorphism.

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: Forbidden material (ADR-003 §4): no gradients or decorative animation.

at-rule-disallowed-list.message: Forbidden material (ADR-003 §4): no @keyframes animation. State transitions (hover/focus) are allowed.
